name: Shuusuke Fuji
description: __Height:__ 167 cm __Play Style:__ Counter Puncher __Dominant Hand:__ Right __Special Moves:__ Tsubame Gaeshi, Higuma Otoshi, Hakugei (Triple Counter) Shuusuke Fuji is a third year student at Seishun Academy. He is given the title of genius due to his tactical skill on the tennis court. Fuji is cheerful and easygoing, with a penchant for playfully teasing those around him. He is the middle child of the Fuji family. His unnamed father is a foreign-based employee, and is never seen in the series.

name: Tatsuya Yoigoshi
description: Yoigoshi is a first year at Noukin High School and a former ace soccer player who dislikes sports. Once, he got invited to join a Kabaddi club. At first, Tatsuya doubted he'd like it, but after watching a practice, he decided to join. Yoigoshi Tatsuya used to be a big football (soccer) player, but he's had enough and, when entering high school, became a livestreamer and shunned all sports. name: Art
description: Art was the superintendent of the Yokohama Police Department and a graduate of Facultas Academy. Despite never actualizing a Minimum ability during his time there, he still graduated as an honors student with his high aptitude. Though because of this, he often is jealous of those with Minimum abilities, making him an easy target for Professor Moral.

description: Cheetu (ヂートゥ, Jītu) is fastest of all the chimera ants. Cheetu is first introduced along with the other recurring squadron leaders early in the Chimera Ant story arc (Source: Hunterpedia)

name: Chief
description: Chief is a Megaloboxer who lives in a community of immigrants called the Casa. His career is relegated to the lower rings. His warm personality has made him a leader of sorts in the Casa group.

name: Frederica Sawyer
description: Frederica Sawyer is a cleaner in the town of Roanapur, Thailand, who specializes in body disposal, but occasionally delves into bounty hunter work. She uses a chainsaw as her disposal tool as well as weapon during bounty hunter work. Since her throat had at one point been cut open, characterized by a massive scar, she uses an Ultravoice to communicate. name: Gaku Sousei
description: He's a sophomore majoring in oil painting, and the vocalist of the band Pantera Negra.

name: Happy
description: Happy is a machine cat from the planet Excede, Rebecca Bluegarden's companion, and a member of the Edens Zero's crew. name: Helio Niccolo
description: __Height:__ 177-185 cm (5' 8"- 6' 1") Helio Niccolo is one of the main characters of Your Throne. He is the young Marquess of the House of Niccolo and the childhood friend of [Medea Solon](https://anilist.co/character/159252/Medea-Belial).

name: Ichi Mezato
description: Ichi Mezato is a school girl who goes to Salt Middle School and is part of the News Club. She is in class 2-1.

name: Kay
description: **Height:** 158 cm (5'2") **Home Town:** Sasebo, Nagasaki Prefecture The energetic leader of the Saunders Sensha-dou team, portrayed as a stereotypical American, who is loud, boisterous, charismatic, and laid back. She believes that Sensha-dou is not war and believes in fair play.

name: Kel
description: Sunny’s childhood friend and Hero's younger brother. Though he's got an impulsive and competitive streak, Kel is an ever loyal companion. You can count on his athletic talent and his dexterity with a ball to knock down foes. He holds his pet rock Hector dearly.

name: Kyousuke Kousaka
description: __Height:__ 175cm Kyousuke is an average highschooler, has average grades, lives in an average family (upper-middle class with a father, mother and sister), and has average physical features. Currently, he attends an average high school with Manami and he begins the story as a first-year, but he becomes a second-year during the events of the novel.
